---
title: "Software"
---

## asymmetric

An R package implementing methods from Rosenberg, Knuppe, and Braumoeller
(2017), [*Unifying the Study of Asymmetric
Hypotheses*](https://doi.org/10.1017/pan.2017.16), *Political Analysis*. The
package provides routines for specifying, estimating, and testing asymmetric
relationships in social-science data.

::: {.pub-links}
[GitHub](https://github.com/asrosenberg)
[Paper](https://doi.org/10.1017/pan.2017.16)
:::

## Replication

Replication code and data for my published papers are posted at the dataverse
or journal-archived locations linked from each entry on the
[Publications](publications.qmd) page.
